Fern PoLrrrcAL PnecrrcEs CouirarssroN
428 J Street. Suite 620 . Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660. Fax (916) 322-0886
September 30,2002
Eric F. Galen
Paul, Hastings, Janofsky & Walker, LLP
515 South Flower, 25m Floor
Los Angeles, CA 90071-2228
Your Request for Advice
Our FiIe No.: W-02-265
Dear Mr. Galen:
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the provisions of the
Political Reform Act ("the Act")l sent to the Commission's Executive Director on
September 20,2002. As we discussed in our telephone conversation on September 5,
2002, the Commission does not provide confirmation of telephone advice. Telephone
advice, as informal assistance, does not provide the requestor with the immunityprovided
by an opinion or formal written advice (section 831,14; regulation 1g329(cX3)).
Consequently, we assume your letter dated September 20,2002, is a request for
written advice pertaining to your question about the duties ofpublic agencies to update
their conflict of interest codes. In future, these requests for written advice should be
mailed to the attention of the Legal Division of the Commission in order to avoid any
delays in obtaining a response.
The Act provides that the Commission may decline to provide written advice
under certain circumstances. Two of these apply in this context:
(1) Under the provisions of regulation 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you identif,z the
person in question on whose behalf you have requested the advice, and state that you are
that person's authorized representative, the Commission may decline to address your
questions or provide analysis.
(2) Additionally, since you have not named a person subject to the Act that you
are authorizedto represent, it appears that your inquiries are hypothetical in nature.
Under regulation 18329(bX8)(D), the Commission may decline to provide written advice
in response to hypothetical questions.
I Gor"*rr*nt Code sections 81000 - gl)l4.Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-
18997, of the Califomia Code of Regulations.
Re
Igsl


File No. W-02-265
Page No. 2
I enclose a copy of regulation 18329 and apublication entitled, "Getting Advice
from the FPPC." If you should need specific written advice in the future, please consult
the booklet for the process used to request such advice.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel
,r.fr
W. Wallace
General Counsel
Division
Enclosures
Jwwjg
